TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv_Cinyuey, title = Cinyuey, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Seediq]}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/wiki/Cinyuey} }

S.FORM: = Cinyuey = Thnganan alang Cinyuey. Thuyang alang Tqriyan tru dgiyaq ka Cin-yuey-cun, kingal ka mquri gsilung, kkana o mqpah dxgal, ciway ka mqpah ppanan, seejiq Nan-aw-tay-ya Ce-aw-rey ka dhiya, ida qriyan knmalu bi kndkilan ni ngngalan idankiya ka alang dha, kiya ni ida dhiya nanaq ka iqan saw nii gaya Tay-ya. Alang Cin-yuey ga niqanhbaraw bi ka seejiq mkla smaluana manu qyqaya, saw gayathjingan, gaya tmsamac, mndaan alang sbiyaw, tminunqwarux, tminun pala, smaluqqhuni, Sayun shlayan rmgri Cin-yuey, uuyas dnii. Nniqan alang I-ran-seyn Nan-aw-syang Cin-yuey-cun Klbangan Nniq yo-an pey-si ta-Nan-aw ni mseupu yayung Daya gqiyan hidaw Ru-pi o wada niqan 1km Kndkilan lnglingay Kklaan ppanan Mgriq nanaq rulu: kndadax Tay-9 seyn 137.7 km, priyux elu Cang-cun can-yey muda Pi-hu-cun hakaw Tgkingal spgan Cin-yuey hiqurigi musa ruwan Cin-yuey-cun. Mlutuc syusan teyn-c Nniqan seejiq alang Syusan teyn-c alang Skari kari Kari Atayal. Snhiyaan Pnyahan alang Kndadaxsnpuan (U-ta sbiyaw) ni (Ryo-sin) dha alang sbiyaw nii ka alangCin-yuey, mnda thjinghini hinika ci-twan Tanah tunux hngkawas siida ni muda thjingalang ka kwo-min-cn-fu, kndudug thjing Cin-yuey. Seejiq(U-ta sbiyaw) ka pnlalaynniq alang Cin-yuey, si-yueyn hngkawas 1915(ta-cn hngkawas4), kika Hayung-naban(Ha- yung No-pan) o madas wadaniqan 100 seejiq musa thjingKa-nan-ran, wada ka knkingalidas do, wada niqan naqih naru, hbaraw ka wada mhuqil, kiya ka kiya ni wasa brinah nniqan dhaplalay kkana duri, wana 13 sapah 72 seejiq trangi nniq Ka-na-ran. 13 sapah 72 sejiq kska nii o yasatqiisug, wada thjing ising alangYahallan (Ya-ha-ran) tnhanganKang-c-tu duri, hraan Hidaw Pi-hu-cun sayan, phiyug nanaq ising ka alangSkba-bo (S-pa-po) se, ta-cnhngkawas 14(si-yueynhngkawas 1925) Muda paru sbgirur ni quyux ka alang hini, qliyan 16 sapah, Kika thjing (alang Ru-pi, alangCin-yuey sayan). Kklaan rgigan Tglaq Cin-yue Tglaq Cin-yuey ga pska dgiyaqka nniqan dha, saw knmalubiqtaan, tdha ka tglaq, kndadax10m mtucing dhuq truma, mlaqssiyaw ka qsiya, knhuway knhuwaymsasug Qluli truma, mtasaw ka qsiya qtaan kana ka dhuq truma. Ini tduwa rrigan ka tglaq Cin-yuey, klahan nanaq ka rmigawseejiq. i-Tribe ŚŹÉŤÄÉŤ≥áśĖô i-Tribe: == php/ryohen-sightseeing bnatas ==
S.PHON: = ¶inju…ô = tńßŇčanan alaŇč ¶inju…ô. tńßujaŇč alaŇč tq…ĺijan t…ĺu dgijaq ka ¶in-ju…ô- ¶un, kiŇčal ka mqu…ĺi gsiluŇč, kkana o mqpańß dxgal, ¶iwaj ka mqpańß ppanan, s…ô…ô…üiq nan-aw-taj-ja ¶…ô-aw-…ĺ…ô ka dńßija, ida q…ĺijan knmalu bi kndkilan ni ŇčŇčalan idankija ka alaŇč dńßa, kija ni ida dńßija nanaq ka iqan saw nii gaja taj-ja. alaŇč ¶in-ju…ô ga niqanńßba…ĺaw bi ka s…ô…ô…üiq mkla smaluana manu qjqaja, saw gajatńß…üiŇčan, gaja tmsama ¶, mndaan alaŇč sbijaw, tminunqwa…ĺux, tminun pala, smaluqqńßuni, sajun sńßlajan …ĺmg…ĺi ¶in-ju…ô, uujas dnii. nniqan alaŇč i-…ĺan-s…ôn nan-aw-sjaŇč ¶in-ju…ô- ¶un klbaŇčan nniq jo-an p…ô-si ta-nan-aw ni ms…ôupu jajuŇč daja gqijan ńßidaw …ĺu-pi o wada niqan *km kndkilan lŇčliŇčaj kklaan ppanan mg…ĺiq nanaq …ĺulu: kndadax taj-* s…ôn ***.* km, p…ĺijux …ôlu ¶aŇč- ¶un ¶an-j…ô muda pi-ńßu- ¶un ńßakaw tgkiŇčal spgan ¶in-ju…ô ńßiqu…ĺigi musa …ĺuwan ¶in-ju…ô- ¶un. mlutu ¶ sjusan t…ôn- ¶ nniqan s…ô…ô…üiq alaŇč sjusan t…ôn- ¶ alaŇč ska…ĺi ka…ĺi ka…ĺi atajal. snńßijaan pnjańßan alaŇč kndadaxsnpuan (u-ta sbijaw) ni (…ĺjo-sin) dńßa alaŇč sbijaw nii ka alaŇč ¶in-ju…ô, mnda tńß…üiŇčńßini ńßinika ¶i-twan tanańß tunux ńßŇčkawas siida ni muda tńß…üiŇčalaŇč ka kwo-min- ¶n-*u, kndudug tńß…üiŇč ¶in-ju…ô. s…ô…ô…üiq(u-ta sbijaw) ka pnlalajnniq alaŇč ¶in-ju…ô, si-ju…ôn ńßŇčkawas ****(ta- ¶n ńßŇčkawas*), kika ńßajuŇč-naban(ńßa- juŇč no-pan) o madas wadaniqan *** s…ô…ô…üiq musa tńß…üiŇčka-nan-…ĺan, wada ka knkiŇčalidas do, wada niqan naqińß na…ĺu, ńßba…ĺaw ka wada mńßuqil, kija ka kija ni wasa b…ĺinańß nniqan dńßaplalaj kkana du…ĺi, wana ** sapańß ** s…ô…ô…üiq t…ĺaŇči nniq ka-na-…ĺan. ** sapańß ** s…ô…üiq kska nii o jasatqiisug, wada tńß…üiŇč isiŇč alaŇčjańßallan (ja-ńßa-…ĺan) tnńßaŇčankaŇč- ¶-tu du…ĺi, ńß…ĺaan ńßidaw pi-ńßu- ¶un sajan, pńßijug nanaq isiŇč ka alaŇčskba-bo (s-pa-po) s…ô, ta- ¶nńßŇčkawas **(si-ju…ônńßŇčkawas ****) muda pa…ĺu sbgi…ĺu…ĺ ni qujux ka alaŇč ńßini, qlijan ** sapańß, kika tńß…üiŇč (alaŇč …ĺu-pi, alaŇč ¶in-ju…ô sajan). kklaan …ĺgigan tglaq ¶in-ju…ô tglaq ¶in-ju…ô ga pska dgijaqka nniqan dńßa, saw knmalubiqtaan, tdńßa ka tglaq, kndadax**m mtu ¶iŇč dńßuq t…ĺuma, mlaqssijaw ka qsija, knńßuwaj knńßuwajmsasug qluli t…ĺuma, mtasaw ka qsija qtaan kana ka dńßuq t…ĺuma. ini tduwa …ĺ…ĺigan ka tglaq ¶in-ju…ô, klańßan nanaq ka …ĺmigaws…ô…ô…üiq. i-t…ĺib…ô **** i-t…ĺib…ô: == pńßp/…ĺjońß…ôn-sigńßts…ô…ôiŇč bnatas ==
S.FORM: = Cinyuey = Thnganan alang Cinyuey. Thuyang alang Tqriyan tru dgiyaq ka Cin-yuey-cun, kingal ka mquri gsilung, kkana o mqpah dxgal, ciway ka mqpah ppanan, seejiq Nan-aw-tay-ya Ce-aw-rey ka dhiya, ida qriyan knmalu bi kndkilan ni ngngalan idankiya ka alang dha, kiya ni ida dhiya nanaq ka iqan saw nii gaya Tay-ya. Alang Cin-yuey ga niqanhbaraw bi ka seejiq mkla smaluana manu qyqaya, saw gayathjingan, gaya tmsamac, mndaan alang sbiyaw, tminunqwarux, tminun pala, smaluqqhuni, Sayun shlayan rmgri Cin-yuey, uuyas dnii. Nniqan alang I-ran-seyn Nan-aw-syang Cin-yuey-cun Klbangan Nniq yo-an pey-si ta-Nan-aw ni mseupu yayung Daya gqiyan hidaw Ru-pi o wada niqan 1km Kndkilan lnglingay Kklaan ppanan Mgriq nanaq rulu: kndadax Tay-9 seyn 137.7 km, priyux elu Cang-cun can-yey muda Pi-hu-cun hakaw Tgkingal spgan Cin-yuey hiqurigi musa ruwan Cin-yuey-cun. Mlutuc syusan teyn-c Nniqan seejiq alang Syusan teyn-c alang Skari kari Kari Atayal. Snhiyaan Pnyahan alang Kndadaxsnpuan (U-ta sbiyaw) ni (Ryo-sin) dha alang sbiyaw nii ka alangCin-yuey, mnda thjinghini hinika ci-twan Tanah tunux hngkawas siida ni muda thjingalang ka kwo-min-cn-fu, kndudug thjing Cin-yuey. Seejiq(U-ta sbiyaw) ka pnlalaynniq alang Cin-yuey, si-yueyn hngkawas 1915(ta-cn hngkawas4), kika Hayung-naban(Ha- yung No-pan) o madas wadaniqan 100 seejiq musa thjingKa-nan-ran, wada ka knkingalidas do, wada niqan naqih naru, hbaraw ka wada mhuqil, kiya ka kiya ni wasa brinah nniqan dhaplalay kkana duri, wana 13 sapah 72 seejiq trangi nniq Ka-na-ran. 13 sapah 72 sejiq kska nii o yasatqiisug, wada thjing ising alangYahallan (Ya-ha-ran) tnhanganKang-c-tu duri, hraan Hidaw Pi-hu-cun sayan, phiyug nanaq ising ka alangSkba-bo (S-pa-po) se, ta-cnhngkawas 14(si-yueynhngkawas 1925) Muda paru sbgirur ni quyux ka alang hini, qliyan 16 sapah, Kika thjing (alang Ru-pi, alangCin-yuey sayan). Kklaan rgigan Tglaq Cin-yue Tglaq Cin-yuey ga pska dgiyaqka nniqan dha, saw knmalubiqtaan, tdha ka tglaq, kndadax10m mtucing dhuq truma, mlaqssiyaw ka qsiya, knhuway knhuwaymsasug Qluli truma, mtasaw ka qsiya qtaan kana ka dhuq truma. Ini tduwa rrigan ka tglaq Cin-yuey, klahan nanaq ka rmigawseejiq. i-Tribe ŚŹÉŤÄÉŤ≥áśĖô i-Tribe: == php/ryohen-sightseeing bnatas ==
S.PHON: = ¶inju…ô = tńßŇčanan alaŇč ¶inju…ô. tńßujaŇč alaŇč tq…ĺijan t…ĺu dgijaq ka ¶in-ju…ô- ¶un, kiŇčal ka mqu…ĺi gsiluŇč, kkana o mqpańß dxgal, ¶iwaj ka mqpańß ppanan, s…ô…ô…üiq nan-aw-taj-ja ¶…ô-aw-…ĺ…ô ka dńßija, ida q…ĺijan knmalu bi kndkilan ni ŇčŇčalan idankija ka alaŇč dńßa, kija ni ida dńßija nanaq ka iqan saw nii gaja taj-ja. alaŇč ¶in-ju…ô ga niqanńßba…ĺaw bi ka s…ô…ô…üiq mkla smaluana manu qjqaja, saw gajatńß…üiŇčan, gaja tmsama ¶, mndaan alaŇč sbijaw, tminunqwa…ĺux, tminun pala, smaluqqńßuni, sajun sńßlajan …ĺmg…ĺi ¶in-ju…ô, uujas dnii. nniqan alaŇč i-…ĺan-s…ôn nan-aw-sjaŇč ¶in-ju…ô- ¶un klbaŇčan nniq jo-an p…ô-si ta-nan-aw ni ms…ôupu jajuŇč daja gqijan ńßidaw …ĺu-pi o wada niqan *km kndkilan lŇčliŇčaj kklaan ppanan mg…ĺiq nanaq …ĺulu: kndadax taj-* s…ôn ***.* km, p…ĺijux …ôlu ¶aŇč- ¶un ¶an-j…ô muda pi-ńßu- ¶un ńßakaw tgkiŇčal spgan ¶in-ju…ô ńßiqu…ĺigi musa …ĺuwan ¶in-ju…ô- ¶un. mlutu ¶ sjusan t…ôn- ¶ nniqan s…ô…ô…üiq alaŇč sjusan t…ôn- ¶ alaŇč ska…ĺi ka…ĺi ka…ĺi atajal. snńßijaan pnjańßan alaŇč kndadaxsnpuan (u-ta sbijaw) ni (…ĺjo-sin) dńßa alaŇč sbijaw nii ka alaŇč ¶in-ju…ô, mnda tńß…üiŇčńßini ńßinika ¶i-twan tanańß tunux ńßŇčkawas siida ni muda tńß…üiŇčalaŇč ka kwo-min- ¶n-*u, kndudug tńß…üiŇč ¶in-ju…ô. s…ô…ô…üiq(u-ta sbijaw) ka pnlalajnniq alaŇč ¶in-ju…ô, si-ju…ôn ńßŇčkawas ****(ta- ¶n ńßŇčkawas*), kika ńßajuŇč-naban(ńßa- juŇč no-pan) o madas wadaniqan *** s…ô…ô…üiq musa tńß…üiŇčka-nan-…ĺan, wada ka knkiŇčalidas do, wada niqan naqińß na…ĺu, ńßba…ĺaw ka wada mńßuqil, kija ka kija ni wasa b…ĺinańß nniqan dńßaplalaj kkana du…ĺi, wana ** sapańß ** s…ô…ô…üiq t…ĺaŇči nniq ka-na-…ĺan. ** sapańß ** s…ô…üiq kska nii o jasatqiisug, wada tńß…üiŇč isiŇč alaŇčjańßallan (ja-ńßa-…ĺan) tnńßaŇčankaŇč- ¶-tu du…ĺi, ńß…ĺaan ńßidaw pi-ńßu- ¶un sajan, pńßijug nanaq isiŇč ka alaŇčskba-bo (s-pa-po) s…ô, ta- ¶nńßŇčkawas **(si-ju…ônńßŇčkawas ****) muda pa…ĺu sbgi…ĺu…ĺ ni qujux ka alaŇč ńßini, qlijan ** sapańß, kika tńß…üiŇč (alaŇč …ĺu-pi, alaŇč ¶in-ju…ô sajan). kklaan …ĺgigan tglaq ¶in-ju…ô tglaq ¶in-ju…ô ga pska dgijaqka nniqan dńßa, saw knmalubiqtaan, tdńßa ka tglaq, kndadax**m mtu ¶iŇč dńßuq t…ĺuma, mlaqssijaw ka qsija, knńßuwaj knńßuwajmsasug qluli t…ĺuma, mtasaw ka qsija qtaan kana ka dńßuq t…ĺuma. ini tduwa …ĺ…ĺigan ka tglaq ¶in-ju…ô, klańßan nanaq ka …ĺmigaws…ô…ô…üiq. i-t…ĺib…ô **** i-t…ĺib…ô: == pńßp/…ĺjońß…ôn-sigńßts…ô…ôiŇč bnatas ==
